title: NTK-aware RoPE scaling for long context
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

RotaryPositionEmbedding in ferrotorch-nn/src/transformer.rs currently supports fixed base (rope_theta). Long-context Llama variants (Llama 3.1 128K, etc.) use NTK-aware or YARN scaling to extend context without retraining.

Work:
- Add RoPEScaling enum: None | Linear { factor } | NtkAware { factor, original_max_pos_embeddings } | Yarn { ... }.
- Apply scaling to the frequency inv_freq during RotaryPositionEmbedding::new.
- Default None; existing behavior preserved.

Not needed for Llama 3 8B base model (8K context, no scaling). Tracked for completeness when we extend to 3.1/3.2/3.3 variants or long-context benchmarks.
